description: Send-capable tool classification read by pre:outbound-send-gate. A tool whose name matches any `deny` pattern AND no `allow` pattern is a LIVE SEND and is gated (requires a review-evidence marker + obeys ESCC_BULK_SEND_MAX). Patterns are JavaScript regular expressions, anchored with ^...$ at match time. Built-in defaults in scripts/lib/outbound-review.js apply when this file is missing or unreadable (fail-closed).
notes: Gmail is draft-only by construction (create_draft is allow-listed). Zapier write actions and any *send*/*reply* mail tool are gated. HubSpot writes go through pre:crm-write-guard, not this gate, so hubspot tools are allow-listed here.
